event: Full commencement of the new FSMA-regulated activity of operating a qualifying cryptoasset trading platform (QCATP), under the Financial Services and Markets Act 2000 (Cryptoassets) Regulations 2026 (SI 2026/102)

Full commencement of the new FSMA-regulated activities of dealing in qualifying cryptoassets, safeguarding (custody) of qualifying cryptoassets, and qualifying cryptoasset staking, under the Financial Services and Markets Act 2000 (Cryptoassets) Regulations 2026 (SI 2026/102)
Full commencement of the new FSMA-regulated activity of issuing a qualifying stablecoin, under the Financial Services and Markets Act 2000 (Cryptoassets) Regulations 2026 (SI 2026/102)

Bank of England's target to finalise its Code of Practice for sterling-denominated systemic stablecoins, subject to feedback on the accompanying policy statement and draft rules due by 22 September 2026
FCA-expected window for the authorisation application period (gateway) for firms wishing to carry on the new cryptoasset regulated activities ahead of the regime's 25 October 2027 commencement

Statutory cessation date of the Financial Services and Markets Act 2023 (Digital Securities Sandbox) Regulations 2023 (SI 2023/1398), the sunset date for the Digital Securities Sandbox absent further legislation

Closing date for responses to Chapter 5 of Quarterly Consultation No 52 (CP26/17), the FCA's proposal to allow UCITS schemes and non-UCITS retail schemes (NURS) to hold up to 10% of scheme property in cryptoasset-backed exchange traded notes (cETNs)
